name: WhatsApp
description: WhatsApp tools for OpenClaw via the local wacli CLI, including chat lookup, message search, diagnostics, backfill, and explicit sends

wacliPath.label: wacli path
wacliPath.help: Absolute path to the wacli binary when it is not available on PATH

requireExplicitSendConfirmation.label: Require send confirmation
requireExplicitSendConfirmation.help: When enabled, send tools require confirm=true before a real message is sent

defaultChatListLimit.label: Default chat limit
defaultChatListLimit.help: Default number of chats returned by whatsapp_chats_list

defaultMessageSearchLimit.label: Default search limit
defaultMessageSearchLimit.help: Default number of messages returned by whatsapp_messages_search
